encounter.reason: annual wellness exam; Tdap booster immunization
encounter.location: Cascade Community Health Center, 8205 SE Foster Road, Portland, OR 97206

conditions.name: mild intermittent asthma
conditions.note: Well controlled per ACT score 24. Albuterol use approximately once per month. Lungs clear. No change in therapy needed.

conditions.name: overweight
conditions.note: BMI 26.9, stable. Patient counseled on healthy diet and physical activity.

medications.name: albuterol sulfate 90 mcg/actuation HFA inhaler
medications.sig: 2 puffs inhaled by mouth every 4-6 hours as needed for wheezing or shortness of breath
medications.note: Refill authorized at this encounter; no dose or frequency change.

immunizations.name: Tdap (tetanus, diphtheria, and acellular pertussis) vaccine
immunizations.note: Last Tdap dose was greater than 10 years ago. Patient tolerated well, no immediate adverse reaction.

immunizations.name: Pfizer-BioNTech COVID-19 mRNA vaccine, first dose
immunizations.note: Historical/reported — not administered at this encounter. Administered at community vaccination site. Second dose scheduled per standard dosing interval.

document_references.description: Annual wellness exam documenting history, review of systems, physical exam findings, vital signs, PHQ-2 and ACT screening results, Tdap immunization administered, COVID-19 vaccination status (first Pfizer dose received, second dose pending), asthma reassessment (well controlled), overweight counseling, lab orders (CBC, CMP, lipid panel, HbA1c), and albuterol refill. Follow-up planned in 12 months.

diagnostic_reports.description: Ordered as part of annual wellness screening. Patient to present to lab for fasting draw. No results available at time of encounter.
